biography:
Florian Munteanu (Romanian: [floˈri.anmunˈte.a.nu]; born 13 October 1990) is a Romanian actor. He is known for playing the boxer Viktor Drago in Creed II (2018) and Creed III (2023), and Razor Fist in Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings (2021).

name: Florian Munteanu
